comment: Hand-authored degradation-profile -> node-chain routing for Simple Mode Auto. Active (non-Legacy) permissive nodes only. Thresholds calibrated against analyzer v2 fixtures. Gated companions (DarkIR, InstructIR, SUPIR, OSDFace) are applied as service overlays when installed+acked — never listed here. DiffBIR/HAT removed permanently; SCUNet/SwinIR/GFPGAN/mask_from_image live under Settings → Legacy. Defect inpaint is deferred to Mask Editor (no Auto mask_from_image).

stages.reason: underexposed (low mean luma + dark fraction) — recover shadow detail before denoising or upscaling
overexposed / clipped highlights — recover remaining highlight detail (generative fill may overlay later)
visible JPEG block artifacts — remove compression artifacts first so later stages don't amplify them
grayscale / near-mono image — colourize with DDColor before upscale
small image — RealESRGAN 4x super-resolution (MambaIR may swap in via High quality tier when installed)
